queries.query: The onboarding doc says install, configure, test, deploy. Rewrite it as task documentation a new SRE can actually follow.
Create troubleshooting steps for when terraform apply fails halfway through.
Please turn this Postman collection into a short how-to for creating a workspace.
We need docs for running the migration safely, including prechecks, postchecks, and gaps where the notes do not provide exact commands.
Explain vector databases to product managers.
Draft a formal proposal to fund better deployment tooling.
Create a status report about how many teams completed onboarding.
Create an API endpoint reference for POST /workspaces with fields, defaults, and status codes.
